message:
feat(web): Add feedback category to support tickets and include contact info in API

Support Ticket Categories:
- Add new "Feedback" category (value: "feedback") to SUPPORT_CATEGORIES
- Position after "Technical Issue" and before "Feature Request" for logical flow
- Description: "General feedback about the product experience"
- Enables users to submit general product feedback separate from bug reports
  or feature requests

Admin Dashboard:
- Add "Feedback" option to category filter dropdown in admin tickets page
- Maintains alphabetical ordering consistent with other filter options

API Response Enhancement:
- Include 'name' and 'email' fields in ticket GET responses
- Applies to both single ticket lookup (by ticket number) and
  email-based ticket listing
- Enables admin dashboard to display submitter contact information
  without additional API calls

These changes improve the support workflow by allowing proper categorization
of general feedback and providing admins with complete ticket context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

                 <option value="all">All categories</option>

                 <option value="feature">Feature request</option>
                 <option value="bug">Bug report</option>
                 <option value="account">Account help</option>

         status: ticket.status,
         category: ticket.category,
         priority: ticket.priority,

     category: ticket.category,

   },
